summary: Profile picture prioritization fix verified. All 9 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend testing confirms custom base64 profile pictures are displayed instead of Google profile pictures in sidebar and dashboard.
critical_code_review_comments: auth.py line 994-1005: /api/auth/me correctly queries peer_profiles.profile_picture for candidates and prioritizes it over users.picture
resources.py line 999-1008: dashboard-summary correctly resolves profile_picture from peer_profiles for non-mentor/non-admin users
resources.py line 902-924: Pending peer feedback sessions are enriched with pictures from peer_profiles
resources.py line 830-852: Upcoming peer sessions are enriched with pictures from peer_profiles
DashboardLayout.jsx line 314-316: Frontend correctly handles base64 images with proper src attribute handling
seed_data_creation: Used existing test users with custom profile pictures
context_for_next_testing_agent: Profile picture prioritization fix is working. The system now correctly prioritizes peer_profiles.profile_picture over users.picture for candidates. Test user kashishm0144@gmail.com has a custom base64 profile picture that displays correctly.

auth_me_endpoint.details: Returns custom base64 picture from peer_profiles instead of Google URL

dashboard_summary_endpoint.details: Returns custom base64 picture in user.picture field

picture_consistency.details: Same picture returned from both /api/auth/me and /api/resources/dashboard-summary

pending_feedbacks_structure.details: pending_feedbacks section has coaching and peer_practice arrays

upcoming_peer_sessions_enrichment.details: Upcoming peer sessions have partner_picture and requester_picture enriched from peer_profiles

frontend_sidebar_picture.details: Sidebar displays base64 custom picture correctly

frontend_peer_practice_pictures.details: Peer practice page shows 3 base64 pictures, 0 Google URLs

mocked_apis.note: All APIs use real MongoDB data. Profile pictures are stored as base64 in peer_profiles collection.
